{{Quote|I couldn't understand how in the name of the Original Light you and the Wookiee ended up showing holo to the Kamar Badlanders.|[[Sonniod/Legends|Sonniod]] to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Han Solo's Revenge">''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''</ref>}}
'''Kamarian Badlanders''' were natives of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]] who lived in equatorial [[Desert/Legends|desert]] regions called the [[Kamar Badlands]].

Standing only about 1.1 to 1.4 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height, they were smaller than other [[Kamarian]]s, and had lighter [[Chitin/Legends|chitin]]. They were, however, hardier and able to survive even longer without [[Water/Legends|water]], and they adapted to even higher temperatures. Badlanders were also more primitive technologically and culturally, using only simple tools and armed only with spears.

In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], a group of Badlanders, who had a great reverence for water, developed the [[Cult of Varn]] around a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] shown to them by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].
